title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
